title: Onboarding - Eula page - check page UI
scenario: Verify the EULA page UI elements (header, description, and instructions text) are displayed correctly when the app is launched for the first time.
steps: Launch the app for the first time.
Observe the EULA (End User License Agreement) page that appears.
Check the header text on the EULA page.
Check the description text on the EULA page.
Check the instructions text on the EULA page.
expected: The EULA page displays correctly with a proper header, description, and instructions text.
